data.name: Hop Step Sing! VR演唱會《希望之夏2020》
data.detailed_description:
【Hop Step Sing! VR演唱會《希望之夏2020》】



Hop Step Sing! 的首次VR演唱會《希望之夏2020》繼2020年10月於日本取得空前的成功，並在進駐大中華地區和北美的舞臺後，現正於Steam開演！
這是利用VR眼鏡的欣賞的360度沉浸式音樂演唱會。她們將以全新的服裝，在無限的VR空間裡由出道曲《奇跡的Shining》到最新曲《Astral Piece》為我們全力演出。
除了可以透過中英文介面以及字幕來享受該演唱會以外，更加入了卡啦OK系統，讓觀眾也能跟著一起唱！
擔當聲優的指出毬球亞、鳥部萬裡子和日岡夏美也會與Hop Step Sing!同台演出，並為我們帶來一個激動人心的驚喜之夜！



【配音】
虹川仁衣菜：指出毬亞
椎柴識理：鳥部萬裡子
箕輪三笠：日岡夏美

【關於Hop Step Sing!】
《Hop Step Sing!》講述三個女生利用VR空間和技術，以達到偶像界的巔峰為目標的青春成長故事。
從2017年開始，該組合活躍在各種媒體上，包括VR MV、Nico Nico直播節目《Hop Nama》、漫畫連載等等。

data.short_description: Hop Step Sing! 的首次VR演唱會《希望之夏2020》現正於Steam開演！ 你將可以透過VR眼鏡來欣賞一場由Hop Step Sing!所帶來的360度沉浸式的音樂饗宴！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1, Windows 8.1 or Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® i5-4590, AMD FX 8350 equivalent or better
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce® GTX 1060, AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or better, Video Output: HDMI 1.4, DisplayPort 1.2 or newer DirectX: Version 9.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
  • 備註: 1x USB 2.0 or better port also required

data.name: Hop Step Sing! VR Live 《Hop★Summer Tour 2020》
data.detailed_description:
【Hop Step Sing! VR Live 《Hop★Summer Tour 2020》】



Hop Step Sing!'s first VR live performance, 《Hop★Summer Tour 2020》, which was held in Japan in October 2020 and later expanded to Greater China and North America, is now available worldwide!

Dive into a 360-degree immersive concert experience tailored for VR headset enthusiasts. Join Niina, Shikiri, and Mikasa as they serenade you with six captivating songs, ranging from their debut hit, "Kisekiteki Shining!" to their latest chart-topper, "Astral Piece." Revel in the refreshed stage designs and their dazzling costume updates. The immersive VR environment lets you cheer for your favorite idols from any viewpoint or proximity of your choosing. English and Chinese language support and Romanji Karaoke system incorporated! As a special treat, the voice actresses themselves will grace the stage as guest stars! Come to experience and enjoy the ever-hottest stage of Hop Step Sing!



【About Hop Step Sing!】
A coming-of-age success story of three girls who aim to reach the pinnacle of the idol world using VR technology. Since 2017, they have been active in various media, including the release of a total of 5 VR music videos, Nico Nico Live Stream program 《Hop Nama》, and series of comics.

【Cast】
Niina Nijikawa: Maria Sashide
Shikiri Shiishiba: Mariko Toribe
Mikasa Minowa: Natsumi Hioka

data.short_description: Hop Step Sing!'s first VR live performance, 《Hop★Summer Tour 2020》is now available on Steam! Put on your VR goggles and enjoy the 360-degree immersive live concert experience you had never seen before!
data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1, Windows 8.1 or Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel® i5-4590, AMD FX 8350 equivalent or better
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce® GTX 1060, AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or better, Video Output: HDMI 1.4, DisplayPort 1.2 or newer DirectX: Version 9.0
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • VR Support: SteamVR
  • Additional Notes: 1x USB 2.0 or better port also required
